<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-ê]][[de:Holz-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre de bois]][[hak:Yet-vi]][[ja:乙未]][[ko:을미]][[nds:Holt-Schaap]][[vi:Ất Mùi]][[za:Ietmeih]][[zh-min-nan:It-bī]][[zh-yue:乙未]][[zh:乙未]]

'''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 32nd combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Wood Horse]] and followed by [[Yang Fire Monkey]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kinoto (乙)]] represents yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[wèi|Goat (未)]] represents yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: itsubi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi

==Years of Yin Wood Goat==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Wood Goat]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[35]]
* [[95]]
* [[155]]
* [[215]]
* [[275]]
* [[335]]
* [[395]]
* [[455]]
* [[515]]
* [[575]]
* [[635]]
* [[695]]
* [[755]]
* [[815]]
* [[875]]
* [[935]]
* [[995]]
|
* [[1055]]
* [[1115]]
* [[1175]]
* [[1235]]
* [[1295]]
* [[1355]]
* [[1415]]
* [[1475]]
* [[1535]]
* [[1595]]
* [[1655]]
* [[1715]]
* [[1775]]
* [[1835]]
* [[1895]]
* [[1955]]
|
* [[2015]]
* [[2075]]
* [[2135]]
* [[:en:2195|2195]]
* [[:en:2255|2255]]
* [[:en:2315|2315]]
* [[:en:2375|2375]]
* [[:en:2435|2435]]
* [[:en:2495|2495]]
* [[2555]]
* [[2615]]
* [[2675]]
* [[2735]]
* [[2795]]
* [[2855]]
* [[:en:2915|2915]]
* [[:en:2975|2975]]
|}
=== Events ===
* [[Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|Otsemi Jihen]] (1895)
* [[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Otsemi Sensou]] (1895)

==Months of Yin Wood Goat==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoto (辛)]] or [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[June]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Wood Goat]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Goat==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Wood Goat]] is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of [[Yin Wood Goat]] is the 3rd day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].

==See Also==
<!--Yin Wood Goat--><!--Yin Wood Goat-->

{{wikidata link|Q1062025}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
